title: lithocarpus laetus
intro: Lithocarpus laetus, also known as the Taiwan cork tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The bark of the Lithocarpus laetus plant contains tannins, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus laetus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. Lithocarpus laetus can be prepared as a decoction or tea, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
